So the highest rated hotels are Good Night (5.0) and Luxury Palace (5.0). Since there are multiple options with the same highest rating, I should choose the one with the higher price. Luxury Palace has a price range of 500-1000, while Good Night is 240-400. So Luxury Palace is the higher-priced option.
